sections.paragraph: f. possession; see Niphal No. 3; especially used of the possession of lands and fields, Lev 27:24, לַאֲשֶׁר לֹו אֲחֻזַּת הָאָרֶץ “whose is the possession of the land,” who possesses that land. Verses 16 Lev 27:16, 21 Lev 27:21, 22 Lev 27:22. קֶבֶר אֲחֻזַּת “possession of a burying place,” i.e. a burying place belonging to a family, Gen 23:4, Gen 23:9, 20 Gen 23:20 49:30 . In connection אֲחֻזַּת נַחֲלָה Num 27:7, and נַחֲלַת אֲחֻזָּה Num 35:2. Used of slaves, Lev 25:45, 46 Lev 25:46.
